## Checklist

- [ ] I built the project cleanly and smoke-tested the flows this change touches.
- [ ] My commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the DCO in CONTRIBUTING.md.
- [ ] The change is focused, and I avoided unrelated reformatting.
- [ ] New Ruwa-owned source/build/config files pass the MPL-2.0 header check.
- [ ] New and changed files have correct copyright/licence metadata and pass
      `reuse lint`.
- [ ] For every added/changed asset, I recorded its source, rightsholder,
      licence, modification status, and required attribution.
- [ ] If I changed a dependency or third-party asset, I updated `NOTICE` and
      `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md`.
- [ ] I updated documentation (`README.md`, `BUILDING.md`, etc.) where relevant.
